user.title: Set up Puffco
user.description: Select a discovered Puffco device, or choose to enter a MAC address manually. Put the device in pairing mode (hold power until the light bar glows blue).

manual.title: Set up Puffco
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Puffco device. Put the device in pairing mode (hold power until the light bar glows blue).

bluetooth_confirm.title: Set up Puffco
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}? Put the device in pairing mode (hold power until the light bar glows blue) before continuing.

confirm.title: Reconnect Puffco
confirm.description: Home Assistant could not reconnect over Bluetooth. Wake the Peak, close the phone app, then confirm to retry with bond reset.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or authenticate to the device.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect or authenticate to the device.

data.show_diagnostics: Show diagnostic entities (advertising, connected, firmware, operating state)
data.block_start_while_charging: Block starting a session while charging
data.fast_poll: Faster background polling when idle (uses more Bluetooth traffic)

reconnect_failed.title: Puffco {name} disconnected
reconnect_failed.description: Bluetooth reconnect failed: {error}. Wake the Peak and use Reconnect, or run the repair action.
